referral.title: Invite Friends
referral.desc: Share your link — you both get 7 days of PRO the moment a friend joins. You get 7 more days when they go Pro.
referral.note: Both you and your friend get PRO — no purchase needed to start.

explanation.limit_desc: You've used {{used}} of {{limit}} free breakdowns today. A fair cap keeps the app free for everyone.
explanation.limit_light: Daily free AI limit reached ({{used}}/{{limit}}). Upgrade to Pro for unlimited breakdowns.

share.title: Session Complete!

subscription.ton_desc: Send exact amount to address below
subscription.success_desc: Your subscription is active. All features unlocked.
subscription.card_redirect: Pay with your card in the opened window. Your Pro plan activates automatically after a successful payment.

paywall.title: This mode is Pro-only
paywall.subtitle: Unlock Pro to practice more effectively and pass more real interviews.
paywall.bullet_1: 6 modes: Blitz, Mock Interview, Bug Hunting, Code, Concept Linker & Mistakes Review
paywall.bullet_3: Resume analysis and up to 50 mock interviews per month

nudge.title: Tip
nudge.tip_1: With Pro you'd pass 3× more interviews 💡
nudge.tip_2: Pro users get through 40% more real interviews
nudge.tip_3: With Pro you train in 5 modes instead of 2
nudge.tip_4: Pro AI breakdowns help you fix weak spots faster

card.repeat_title: Spaced repetition: you saw this before — great for long-term memory
card.sr_note: ↻ Spaced repetition: this card came back because it's due for review — that's how it sticks in memory.

onboarding.title: Ready for the interview?
onboarding.subtitle: A Tinder-style trainer. Level up Java, Python or TypeScript in 5 minutes a day.
onboarding.step_setup_desc: Choose what to learn — Java, Python or TypeScript — and the topics you care about.
onboarding.step_know_desc: “Know it” — topic done, your counter grows
onboarding.step_dont_desc: “Don't know” — we show the answer & an AI breakdown
onboarding.step_tap_desc: Flip it to reveal the short answer
onboarding.step_pro_desc: Pro unlocks unlimited AI breakdowns and all training modes. Cancel anytime.
onboarding.hero_sub: Practice real interview questions by swiping — just 5 minutes a day to land your next dev job.
onboarding.swipe_desc: Swipe right if you know it, left if you don't. We instantly remember what you've mastered.
onboarding.ai_desc: Stuck on a question? Get an instant breakdown with theory, examples and key points.
onboarding.modes_desc: Blitz, Mock Interview, Bug Hunting, Code, Concept Linker & more — train every skill.
onboarding.progress_desc: Track accuracy, streak and readiness. Come back daily to stay sharp and beat others.

missed.title: Not knowing is fine 🙌
missed.desc: Here's the short answer. Want a full AI breakdown with examples?
missed.pro_hint: Deep AI breakdowns are included in Pro

language.title: Choose Tech Stack
language.subtitle: Select the language you want to practice

review.title: Mistakes Review
review.all_done_desc: You have no weak spots right now. Keep practising to stay sharp.
review.cta_desc: Rehearse the questions you keep getting wrong until they stick.
review.locked_desc: Repeat your weak spots until they stick. This is a Pro feature.

progress.title: Your progress
progress.brag: You know more than {{p}}% of learners. Share your result!
progress.go_pro: Unlock all modes, mistakes review & deep analytics with Pro
progress.saved_desc: Questions you bookmarked to review later.
progress.readiness_sub: Mix of your accuracy ({{accuracy}}%) and how much you've learned ({{known}} questions). Keep going — it grows as you practice.
progress.saved_empty: No saved questions yet. Tap the bookmark on any card to save it for later.

saved.title: Saved questions
saved.empty: No saved questions yet. Tap the bookmark on any card to save it for later.

refresher.banner: You've covered all new questions — these are refreshers to lock it in.

blitz.title: Blitz Mode
blitz.description: Answer as many questions as possible in 60 seconds. True or False only!

resume.subtitle: Paste your resume text to personalize your training
resume.label: Resume text
resume.placeholder: Paste your resume here (experience, skills, projects)...
resume.error_parse: Could not parse the resume. Try again or simplify the text.
resume.error_rate: Request limit exceeded. Wait a minute and try again.
resume.error_generic: Analysis error. Check your connection and try again.

landing.title: Don't walk into your Java interview unprepared
landing.tagline: Practice real interview questions 10 minutes a day. Swipe what you know, get an instant AI breakdown of what you don't — and walk in ready.
landing.sub: No card required · start in 30 seconds · Java, Python & TypeScript
landing.f_swipe_d: Real questions from real interviews — not random trivia.
landing.f_modes_d: Swipe left on anything you don't know and get an instant AI breakdown.
landing.f_streak_d: Spaced repetition resurfaces what you forget — so it sticks.
landing.f_percentile_d: A readiness score vs other candidates tells you if you're good to go.
landing.how_title: From "I hope they don't ask that" to "bring it on"
landing.how_1: Pick your language and the topics you're weakest on.
landing.how_2: Swipe through real interview questions — 10 minutes feels like a game.
landing.how_3: Every gap gets an instant AI explanation, so you never stay stuck.
landing.how_4: Your readiness score climbs until you know you're interview-ready.
landing.pricing_note: Cancel anytime · also available for 450 Telegram Stars / month.
landing.getapp_sub: Use it as a Telegram Mini App or install it as a PWA on your phone — same account, your progress follows you.
landing.app_tg_desc: Opens instantly inside Telegram — desktop or mobile, no install needed.
landing.app_pwa_desc: Add to your home screen. Works offline, feels native, lives next to your other apps.
landing.app_pwa_hint: Tap your browser menu → "Add to Home Screen"
landing.faq1_q: Do I need to install anything?
landing.faq1_a: No. You can open Interview Tinder right inside Telegram, or play on the web — no download required. Install it as an app later if you want it on your home screen.
landing.faq2_a: Yes — the Free plan gives you 40 questions a day and 3 AI explanations, forever. Pro unlocks every mode and unlimited AI breakdowns.
landing.faq3_a: Java, Python and TypeScript — with questions spanning core syntax, data structures, concurrency, system design and framework internals.
landing.faq4_a: Yes. Sign in with Telegram or email and your streak, readiness score and saved questions follow you across the Mini App and the web/PWA.
landing.final_sub: 10 free minutes a day is all it takes.

pwa.install_sub: Add to home screen for quick access — works offline.

demo.result_sub: You knew {{known}} of {{total}} — a real interview covers hundreds.
demo.percentile: 🔥 Ahead of {{beat}}% of {{language}} candidates this month.

demo.save_note: Unlock spaced repetition, all modes, AI explanations & your full readiness score.
